headline: Trump GUARDIAN 🛡️🍊 HITS IRAN HARD 💥🔥 20% HORMUZ TOLL 🛢️💰
text: Trump 🍊👑 declared himself the BIG DADDY 🛡️💪 GUARDIAN of the Hormuz Strait 🌊🛢️ after the third straight night of US MISSILE MAYHEM 💥🚀🔥 on Iran! The UAE 🇦🇪 just DROPPED the MIC 🎤😱 calling Iran's tanker strike a 'BRAZEN ATTACK' 🤬💣 that killed one Indian crew member and WOUNDED eight more, four SUPER SERIOUS 😵💉! Six injured were Indian 🇮🇳, two Ukrainian 🇺🇦, all thanks to IRGC cruise missiles 🛰️⚔️ that locked on two UAE tankers like a jealous EX 👀💔! Iran clapped back on Telegram 📱 saying the ships ignored warnings and tried sneaking through a MINED ROUTE 🧨🗺️ so they got DISABLED 💥🚫 and now everyone's REGRETTING it like a bad tattoo 😩🖤! IRGC warned that teaming with the 'aggressor enemy' 🦹‍♂️🇺🇸 will bring 'regret, damage, and an ENERGY CRISIS' ⚡🌍! Trump hit back with a 20% TOLL CHARGE 💵📈 on all Hormuz cargo like it's a toll booth on the highway to hell 🛣️😈, calling the USA the NEW 'GUARDIAN OF THE HORMUZ STRAIT' 🦸‍♂️🛢️ and promising to keep it 'fair and open' for everyone except Iranian ships 🚫🇮🇷! He said the US is 'hitting them very hard' 💪🔨 and 'knocking out their offensive capability' like a boxing champ 🥊🏆! Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi clapped back saying Iran will stay the REAL GUARDIAN FOREVER 👑🇮🇷 but 20% is 'TOO MUCH' 😂💸 and they'll be 'fair' – classic frenemies energy 🥊💔! Centcom 🚀📍 struck Bushehr, Chah Bahar, Jask, Konarak, Abu Musa and Bandar Abbas to 'degrade Iran's ability to attack commercial shipping' 🚢💥, while Iran fired back at US assets in Kuwait 🇰🇼! Traffic through the strait is still TRICKLING like a broken faucet 💧🚰, oil prices are creeping up like a bad hangover 🍺📈, and the UN says 'NO LEGAL BASIS' for these tolls 🙅‍♂️📜! Trump said a DEAL is still possible 🤝💼 but the whole region is basically a powder keg ready to EXPLODE 💣🌍 – stay tuned for more drama, fam! 🔥😎
